creator: ygy@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Zetro Track from comment #4)

Exactly what I am saying - in order to update the website, someone needs to submit a diff against the source code that generates the website: https://cgit.freebsd.org/doc/tree/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/x11/chapter.xml#n1448.
